//: Map of Windows Forms sources to their Avalonia twins. One entry per ported source file.
status: scaffolded (compiles, layout unfinished) | functional (works, reduced feature set) | parity (feature-complete twin).
basedOn: the upstream commit the twin was last synchronized with.
eng/avalonia/upstream-drift.sh joins upstream diffs against this map; keep it accurate when porting or syncing.

src/app/GitUI/Properties/Images.resx.notes: All file-backed images are deterministically generated as same-named cached Avalonia Bitmap properties and packaged from their existing tracked files; the setup logo also supplies the shared application WindowIcon. The generator/completeness test detects Images.resx drift, missing package resources, decode failures, and exceptional property-to-filename mappings.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormBrowse.notes: Functional repository shell with the implemented Repository/Commands/Tools menus and upstream-shaped ToolStripMain/ToolStripFilters chrome. The compact 25px toolbar has refresh/left-panel/lower-workspace layout controls, recent working-directory and current-branch selectors, persisted pull split actions, push/commit/stash actions, file explorer and terminal; it wraps rather than hiding commands at narrow widths. The original CommitInfoTabControl boundary hosts selection-driven Commit and Diff, lazily loaded File tree and GPG, a lazy portable plain-text shell, and shared Output history; Output follows the original tab-versus-toggleable-panel settings. ShowSplitViewLayout and below/left/right CommitInfoPosition settings are shared with WinForms, and in-session splitter sizes survive toggling/position changes. Settings, scripts/plugins and worktrees/submodules remain absent until their owning phases. Browse hotkeys dispatch the implemented commands and workspace focus/navigation with upstream IDs; Ctrl+D6 and Ctrl+D9 focus Console and Output, while F5 uses Avalonia-only command ID 50 because WinForms routes it through ToolStrip shortcut handling. The revision grid receives the shared ahead/behind provider and quick filter state; its path filter supplies the same followed-file fallback to both RevisionDiffControl instances. Repository reload, refs/history, and GPG work use one form-owned lifetime boundary, so queued notifications and unfinished providers cannot outlive shutdown. Main panes preserve invisible 6px splitter drag targets, adjacent 1px borders, 6px content padding, and the 260px repository-tree distance. The headless-Skia harness captures the complete shell in light/dark at 100%/125%/150%/200% scaling.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/RevisionDi.notes: Same-named shared Diff/File-tree boundary using the linked unchanged FileStatusDiffCalculator, followed-file selection, lazy cancellation-safe loading, committed blob/image viewing through FileViewer in tree mode, diff viewing in ordinary mode, continuous file navigation, and WinForms-shaped Bind/DisplayDiffTab/SelectFileOrFolder/SwitchFocus members. Owner-managed loaders switch through their JoinableTaskFactory so close-time joins cannot deadlock behind the Avalonia dispatcher. Shared FileStatusList actions filter selected paths in the revision grid, navigate ordinary-diff selections to the paired File tree, and apply supported selected/whole revision patches through FileViewer; diff-option changes reload the selection and applied patches request a repository refresh. Inline blame, script options, and custom tools retain their later owners.
The original DiffSplitContainer, DiffFiles, and DiffText identities map to a bordered two-pane Avalonia grid with an invisible six-DIP splitter hit target. BlameControl remains deferred.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/RevisionGp.notes: Same-named GPG status renderer using the shared GpgInfo/CommitStatus/TagStatus records, original translated unsigned messages, unchanged generated signature/tag icons, native-newline normalization, conditional tag row, and a focusable read-only verification surface.

The original tableLayoutPanel1, commitSignPicture, tagSignPicture, txtCommitGpgInfo, and txtTagGpgInfo identities map to a two-row Avalonia grid; the tag row collapses when no tag exists and otherwise shares the available height equally.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/OutputHistory.notes: Same-named read-only monospace history surface with the original TextBox, copy, and clear identities. Clickable links remain deferred.
The RichTextBox and ContextMenuStrip map to a read-only no-wrap Avalonia TextBox and ContextMenu using the existing translation identities.
Preserves shared-history subscription, copy/clear behavior, tail positioning, focus contract, and disposal. Link activation remains deferred with rich-text link rendering.
Creates the original OutputHistoryTab only when history is enabled and focuses its content through the upstream Ctrl+D9 command.
Maps the synchronized WinForms split panels to one lower cross-pane Avalonia row, preserving OutputHistoryPanelVisible toggling, focus, a six-DIP splitter target, and the last in-session height.

src/app/GitUI/Models/OutputHistoryModel..notes: Preserves the bounded process-wide history, formatting, ANSI removal, notifications, and clear behavior; ANSI stripping reuses the Avalonia diff parser because the WinForms model references ICSharpCode.TextEditor markers.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FullBleedT.notes: The Avalonia twin retains the standard TabControl theme through StyleKeyOverride; compact zero-radius workspace-tab styling removes the Fluent spacing that the WinForms native display-rectangle adjustment removed.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormChecko.notes: Full local and remote flow: remote checkout with reset/create-tracking/custom-name/detached-head options, non-fast-forward reset warning, custom-name validation and auto-normalisation, auto-stash with the upstream task dialog, and submodule update after a changed checkout. The WinForms ErrorProvider validation is an on-checkout message box, Avalonia SizeToContent replaces the ApplyLayout row math, and before/after-checkout event scripts wait for the ScriptsEngine phase (3.23).

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormMergeB.notes: Branch/tag/remote selection (including multiple heads), fast-forward/no-ff/no-commit/squash/unrelated-history/strategy/log/custom-message options, persisted settings, real process execution, conflict handling, help images, Browse menu, and Ctrl+M hotkey. Before/after merge ScriptsEngine events remain deferred to Phase 3.23.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormRebase.notes: Plain and interactive rebase support heads/remotes/tags, immediate and advanced-option entry points, autosquash/preserve-merges/auto-stash/date/update-refs/specific-range options, real process execution, repository notification, Browse menu, and Ctrl+Shift+E. The in-progress controller supports PatchGrid visualization/skipped state, add-files, commit, edit-todo, continue, skip, abort, conflict resolution, and commit/patch detail on row double-click.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormApplyP.notes: Same-named file/directory patch source surface with persisted whitespace/sign-off options, raw-diff and mailbox application, PatchGrid state, add-files/conflict resolution, continue, skip, abort, repository notification, and portable file/folder pickers. This completes middle-of-patch recovery through GitUICommands and MergeConflictHandler.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormAddFil.notes: Filter, force, dry-run preview, and add execution preserve the original FormProcess flow.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormStash..notes: Manage/create mode, worktree/index and stored-stash file lists, real diff preview, stash all/selected, apply/drop, persisted options, repository refresh binding, continuous file scrolling, and Ctrl+N/Ctrl+P/F5 hotkeys. The drop confirmation uses the Compat TaskDialog surrogate. The main divider uses the shared light/dark splitter brush. The shared FileStatusList supplies filtering, status imagery, navigation, and file context actions; supported stored-stash patches can be cherry-picked by selected lines or as a whole file through FileViewer, and diff-option changes reload the selection.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormResolv.notes: Ported at the post-97cfa7b44 shape (FormBusyScope keeps the UI thread free while the merge tool runs). The conflicted-files grid is a multi-select ListBox showing file names (the hidden Author column had no data source upstream); SortableBindingList header-sort is dropped, while the shared go-to-manual control is functional. Solve-conflict choices (keep local/remote/base, apply-to-all) use the Compat TaskDialog surrogate. SaveFileDialog becomes the Avalonia storage provider; "open with"/"show in folder" fall back to the default application/folder outside Windows. Context-menu Ctrl+1..3 shortcuts are dispatched in OnKeyDown. The shared CustomDiffMergeToolProvider populates the original customMergetool menu and launches the selected native tool for every selected conflict. Submodule conflicts use the real same-named FormMergeSubmodule workflow. The file-history item is live since 3.8.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormMergeS.notes: Same-named submodule conflict controller showing base/local/remote/current revisions, refreshing and staging the current checkout, offering local/remote revision checkout through the submodule command service, and opening an in-process Avalonia browser for the submodule. FormResolveConflicts preserves the original dialog-result staging follow-up.

src/app/GitUI/CustomDiffMergeToolProvide.notes: Avalonia MenuItem adapter over the unchanged shared discovery/cache contract. It preserves delayed loading, configured-default ordering, bold/default shortcut presentation, per-form diff-tool disabling, cancellation, and consumer-owned launch handlers.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/MergeConfl.notes: Verbatim; middle-of-rebase and middle-of-patch follow-ups reach the functional same-named FormRebase and FormApplyPatch controllers.

src/app/GitUI/FormBusyScope.cs.notes: Introduced upstream by 97cfa7b44. Avalonia windows have no IsDisposed; re-enabling unconditionally is safe.

src/app/GitUI/WaitCursorScope.cs.notes: WinForms swaps one global Cursor.Current; the twin swaps the cursor of every open window and restores on dispose, nesting like the original.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormCreate.notes: Creates and optionally checks out normal or orphan branches. Commit selection accepts a revision/SHA as text or the shared FormChooseCommit dialog. A successful checkout to a different commit reuses the same UICommands.UpdateSubmodules confirmation and update path as FormCheckoutBranch.

Creates lightweight, annotated, default-key-signed, or specific-key-signed tags through the shared GitTagController, with revision picking, force, and optional push through FormRemoteProcess. EditNetSpell is represented by the same-named multiline TextBox until Phase 3.21; push event scripts remain deferred.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormDelete.notes: Local branch selection and forced deletion preserve the upstream current-branch, unmerged-branch, main/linked/stale-worktree safety flow. The Compat TaskDialog supplies the explicit default button and reflog footnote used by the confirmations.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormInit.c.notes: Directory picker (shared FolderBrowserButton twin), recent-locals history in the combo (path strings rather than Repository objects), personal/central repository types, rooted-path validation, git init through the module, module-changed event, and history update. StartInitializeDialog is live.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormClone..notes: URL/destination/subdirectory with live location info, clipboard URL suggestion, current-remote prefill, remote branch listing on dropdown (default remote-HEAD / no-checkout items) with the original busy cursor and direct native Git/OpenSSH error reporting, shallow-clone and submodule options, repository type, open-after-clone question, and history updates; clone execution uses FormRemoteProcess with OpenSSH. StartCloneDialog is live. The PuTTY pieces (Load SSH key and registry/key-agent recovery) remain intentionally omitted, and the ShowInTaskbar test is replaced by the dialog invocation itself; history combos hold path strings rather than Repository objects.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormRemote.notes: Remote management (create/edit/rename via SaveRemote, delete with confirmation, activate/deactivate via ToggleRemoteState, translated Active/Inactive groups, separate push url, URL suggestions from history + git-hosting-pattern rewriting, owner-from-URL name suggestion, native Avalonia color selection/reset, prefix behind AlwaysShowAdvOpt, auto-configure question wiring StartPullDialogAndPullImmediately) and the default-pull tab (the original grid is read-only; tracking-remote and merge-with editing uses its detail fields and commits to the correct selected head on focus leave or row change; preselect opens the tab). StartRemotesDialog is live. The PuTTY panel/connection test remains intentionally omitted in favor of OpenSSH. URL combos hold path strings.
Framework-free source linked unchanged into GitUI.Avalonia.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormClone..notes: Framework-free source linked unchanged into GitUI.Avalonia.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/FolderBrowser.notes: Same-named button with the original buttonBrowse.Text translation key; PathShowingControl is typed as the Avalonia ComboBox (the WinForms property accepts any Control). Picks through the portable OsShellUtil.PickFolder (XDG portal on Linux).

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormFileHi.notes: Shell: the revision grid filtered to one path (history always loads on show) above the Diff and Blame tabs, with the WinForms title format and showBlame initial-tab selection; implements IRevisionGridFileUpdate for blame navigation; the Blame tab hides for artificial commits. Its original revision-row difftool actions use the shared CustomDiffMergeToolProvider and preserve native-tool selection plus selected-to-parent and selected-to-local ranges. StartFileHistoryDialog opens the window in-process and non-modal instead of launching a separate client process. Deferred: View/Commit tabs, the remaining browse menus and filter toolbar (including blame display options), rename following (--follow, FilePathByObjectId), full-history/simplify-merges options, and the build report.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormDelete.notes: Local deletion, optional deletion from one configured remote through FormRemoteProcess, the shared remote selector, and the shared manual link are functional. Before/after push event scripts remain deferred to the ScriptsEngine tranche.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormCommit.notes: Whole-file commit workflows are functional: staged/unstaged multi-selection and context actions, revision-aware FileViewer preview with the consumer-owned external-difftool action, selected-line stage/unstage/reset with reload blocking, normal/amend/empty commits, fixup/squash/amend autosquash messages, soft reset, commit-message persistence/history/templates and conventional prefixes, shared validation settings, custom author/sign-off/no-verify/GPG/reset-author arguments, merge-conflict and detached-HEAD recovery, commit-and-push including force-with-lease after amend, optional superproject staging, compact original-named toolbar/options/status controls, and the original close/refresh preferences. Git hook bypass is functional through No verify. Git Extensions before/after event scripts remain owned by the later shared scripts-engine port; template-settings editing remains owned by the settings host.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormPush.c.notes: Portable push workflows are functional through FormRemoteProcess: configured remote or URL/native-path destinations with history and folder browsing; editable single-branch, all-branch, tag/all-tag, and multi-branch push/force/delete modes; new-branch and tracking-reference prompts; remote management; force-with-lease/force safety; recursive-submodule options; push-on-show and commit-and-push; and rejected-push recovery through pull-merge/rebase or force-with-lease retry. Git Extensions before/after push event scripts remain owned by the later shared scripts-engine port, plugin-host pull-request creation remains owned by plugin activation, and PuTTY/Pageant controls are intentionally omitted in favor of OpenSSH.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormPull.c.notes: Portable pull/fetch workflows are functional through FormRemoteProcess: configured remote, all-remotes, and URL/native-path sources with history and folder browsing; remote management and branch selection; merge, rebase, and fetch-only actions; auto-stash/pop; reachable/no/all-tag, prune/prune-tags, and unshallow options; fetch-and-prune confirmation; submodule initialization/update follow-up; and stale-ref, merge-conflict, and rebase-conflict recovery. Git Extensions before/after fetch and pull event scripts remain owned by the later shared scripts-engine port, and PuTTY/Pageant controls are intentionally omitted in favor of OpenSSH.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/FilterToolBar.notes: WinForms-shaped quick-filter twin bound to IRevisionGridFilter: all/current/filtered branches, branch-type completion, commit/committer/author/diff text filters, reflog, first-parent and reset actions. The not-yet-ported advanced date/limit dialog is intentionally absent; its primary funnel action focuses the functional quick text filter. Existing FormBrowse translation and tooltip keys are reused explicitly.
Compact 25px Avalonia toolbar layout with the original field names, ordering, split menus and icons.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/RevisionGrid/.notes: Framework-free filter argument builder linked unchanged.
Framework-free filter contract linked unchanged.
Framework-free quick-filter value linked unchanged.
Framework-free filter-state event payload linked unchanged.

Read-only graph/ref labels/selection plus preselection, double-click notification and the shared IRevisionGridFilter contract. Default reloads use the unchanged FilterInfo argument builder, so branch/current/reflog, message/committer/author/diff, first-parent and path filters match WinForms and persist through AppSettings; explicit caller-supplied revision filters remain supported. The context menu routes copy details, stash apply/pop/drop, local/remote checkout, local push, merge and rebase variants, artificial-row reset/commit, branch/tag creation, local rename/delete, tag delete, parent/child/current navigation, and provider visibility toggles through real Avalonia workflows; RevisionContextMenu lets specialized hosts such as File History replace that menu. Persisted upstream RevisionGrid command IDs/default hotkeys dispatch from FormBrowse. Recycled rows use the same ordered ColumnProvider boundary; settings control graph, notes, author, date and object-ID visibility, while visible lanes determine graph width. Refs mark the checked-out branch/tracking remote. Selection drives shared author highlighting; related refs and superproject data are functional. Owner-managed superproject loading returns through its JoinableTaskFactory for cancellation-safe shutdown.
Framework-free command enum linked unchanged so persisted hotkey IDs remain identical to WinForms.
Avalonia MenuItem twin copies filtered branch/tag names plus commit hash, message, author and date details with the original translated captions, access keys and shared icons.
Framework-free source linked unchanged; the Avalonia revision grid refreshes realized provider rows when the selected-author state changes.
Framework-free source linked unchanged and populated through the shared superproject module APIs.

Same-named ordered provider boundary adapted from DataGridView painting/formatting to creation and update of controls in recycled Avalonia rows; the companion layout model retains width, minimum width, visibility, availability and resizability metadata.

Owns graph cells, visible-lane autosizing, the draw-non-relatives setting and lane tooltips from the shared LaneInfoProvider. The WinForms bitmap GraphCache is intentionally omitted because Avalonia draws only realized cells.

Owns ref capsules, checked-out title weight, subject/ref tooltips, tag/remote filtering, fill styling, exact-shape hover highlighting and related-ref double-click navigation. Shared ahead/behind data produces dashed virtual tracking refs; independently loaded superproject checkout/conflict/additional refs and matching-ref dashed outlines mirror WinForms. Expanded commit-message/artificial/stash content remains deferred.
Shows the first note line and the complete note tooltip; RevisionReader requests note data when this column is enabled. Delayed commit-data loading remains with its owning service integration.
Correct ordered slot, width and visibility setting; deliberately unavailable until the real Avalonia avatar service lands in Phase 3.22, so no placeholder data is displayed.
Author text, visibility setting and translated author/committer tooltip are functional; the linked upstream AuthorRevisionHighlighting state bolds all realized revisions matching the selected author.
Honors date-column visibility, author-versus-committer date and relative-versus-absolute formatting, including the shared LocalizationHelpers relative-date text and the original detailed tooltip.
Uses the configured monospace styling, sizes the abbreviated object ID to the available column width and exposes the full ID tooltip.
Correct ordered slot and layout metadata; deliberately unavailable until its build-server integration supplies real status data.

Avalonia DrawingContext twin preserves the WinForms ref ordering, tag point, current-branch and tracking-remote indicators, joined local/tracking-remote point/notch geometry, fill mode, dashed virtual/superproject outlines and hover emphasis. Each capsule retains its ref and exact geometry for point/notch hit testing. Theme-variant semantic resources supply the invariant/dark branch, remote, tag, other, and neutral-capsule colors, while configured per-remote colors override the semantic remote brush like WinForms.
Linked unchanged.
Linked unchanged.
Linked unchanged.
Covered by golden-image tests in GitUI.Avalonia.Tests.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/FileStatusLis.notes: Reusable list/tree boundary with the original case-insensitive regex filter over current and old names, invalid-input retention/feedback, filtered counts, configurable multi-selection, revision-aware grouping, repository refresh binding, navigation, and WinForms-shaped events. The complete added/removed/modified/renamed/copied/unmerged/range-diff image matrix and asynchronously resolved submodule variants use the shared image cache. File-tree mode builds an ordinal folders-first hierarchy, restores followed selections, and supplies select/expand/collapse actions. The original revision-list SetDiffs, AllItems, and SelectedGitItem surface is available to CommitDiff. FileViewer line/chunk capability is consumed through a callback so unsupported selections remain disabled; custom difftools retain their later owner.

Same-named context-menu boundary with consumer-supplied stage/unstage callbacks plus portable open, copy paths, show folder, show in File tree, revision-grid path filtering, history/blame, and tree expansion. The cherry-pick action is visible only for bound consumers and enabled only for one selection whose FileViewer reports line-patching support. Ignore/custom-difftool actions retain their later owners.

Compact filter/count row, empty-state label, status list, repository tree, and same-named context items preserve existing translation identities. The active/invalid filter backgrounds are semantic light/dark resources; later toolbar/search commands remain absent rather than inert.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/FileStatusDif.notes: Framework-free source linked unchanged; supplies both ordinary revision groups and GetTreeFiles-backed file-tree data.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/GotoUserManua.notes: Preserves the translated Help link, manual icon, URL tooltip, and default-browser launch. Designer/test construction tolerates the documentation base URL not being initialized yet.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/RemotesCombob.notes: Loads configured remote names through the shared GitModule and preserves editable single selection. Like the original, enabling the unimplemented multi-select mode throws.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/BranchComboBo.notes: Editable branch/ref selector with typed display template, selected-text API, validation, and the multi-branch selection dialog. Avalonia's editable ComboBox supplies completion behavior instead of WinForms Suggest mode.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/HelpImageDisp.notes: Reusable expandable/collapsible help image, persisted expansion state, hover image swap, and original translation keys. Dynamic top-level resizing is unnecessary because Avalonia layout reflows the host.

src/app/GitUI/Editor/FileViewer.cs.notes: Read-only AvaloniaEdit viewer with parsed normal/combined/word/range/fixed diffs, old/new line-number mapping, semantic line and inline coloring, revision-aware Git diff loading, Escape handling, and top/bottom continuous-scroll events. FormViewPatch uses the original ViewFixedPatch boundary so loaded patch context cannot be regenerated. For blame: plain-text mode, mapped navigation, and a separate full-width background renderer. The original Find/Find previous/Go-to-line, context-line, entire-file, whitespace, change/occurrence navigation, and selected-line stage/unstage/reset command IDs and persisted hotkeys are functional. Copy, Copy patch/new/old version, Find and Go-to-line context actions are present; Replace stays hidden while the viewer is read-only. The shared PatchManager produces selected/new/reset patches without duplicate UI-specific patch logic, Git apply runs through the repository executable, reset is confirmed through the Avalonia TaskDialog adapter, and PatchApplied lets Commit/RevisionDiff reload safely. Revision and stash views can apply selected or whole patches with conflict recovery. The original cancellation/latest-load boundary covers working-tree files and committed blobs; text, binary detection with bounded hex output, image preview/fallback, submodules, 5 MB deferred preview, file preambles, encoding selection/reload notification, and error display are functional. AvaloniaEdit built-in definitions provide filename-extension syntax highlighting; remembered syntax/nonprinting/context/whitespace/entire-file settings, line-number override, text/glyph EOL markers, and settings-backed vertical ruler are functional. Dark syntax foregrounds remain independent of semantic diff rendering. Revision-aware consumers retain their external-difftool callback and F3 invokes it when present.

src/app/GitUI/Editor/FileViewer.Designer.notes: AvaloniaEdit surface with the functional original context-menu identities for selected-line stage/unstage/reset, Copy and Copy patch/new/old version, context-line count, entire-file and whitespace options, nonprinting/syntax toggles, Find, Replace (hidden while read-only), and Go to line. The centered no-upscale image surface and original large-preview link identity remain. The compact hover toolbar restores change navigation, context-line count, entire-file, nonprinting, syntax, whitespace, and encoding actions with the original names and shared icons.

src/app/GitUI/Editor/ViewMode.cs.notes: Framework-free view-mode enum linked unchanged into GitUI.Avalonia.

src/app/GitUI/Editor/ViewModeExtension.c.notes: Framework-free view-mode classification linked unchanged into GitUI.Avalonia.

src/app/GitUI/Editor/FindAndReplaceForm..notes: Same-named reusable modeless Find/Replace window with forward/backward wrapping, case and whole-word matching, selection scan regions, multi-file loader boundary, replace/replace-all, framework-native highlight-all rendering, and next/previous highlighted-occurrence navigation consumed by FileViewer. The current FileViewer exposes Find mode only because it remains read-only; scan-region shading and the optional editor filename in the title remain deferred.
Fixed-size layout preserves every original control identity, translation key, mode-dependent visibility, and action grouping.

src/app/GitUI/Editor/FormGoToLine.cs.notes: One-based bounded line selection, translated range label, initial selection/focus, and WinForms-shaped dialog result behavior.

src/app/GitUI/Editor/FormGoToLine.Design.notes: Compact fixed dialog retains the original label, numeric input, OK, and Cancel identities; the native Fluent numeric spinner requires a slightly taller input and client area than WinForms.

src/app/GitUI/Editor/Diff/DiffLineInfo.c.notes: Uses AvaloniaEdit.Document.ISegment in place of the former WinForms editor segment.

src/app/GitUI/Editor/Diff/DiffLineNumAna.notes: Normal, combined, ANSI word-diff, moved-line, multiple-hunk, and no-newline mapping over AvaloniaEdit documents.

src/app/GitUI/Editor/Diff/LinesMatcher.c.notes: AvaloniaEdit segment twin used for bounded replacement-line pairing and common-word matching.

src/app/GitUI/Editor/Diff/DiffHighlightS.notes: Framework-native highlight model retains ANSI semantic spans and computes dimmed common spans; rendering is split between AvaloniaEdit background and text layers.

src/app/GitUI/Editor/Diff/DiffViewerLine.notes: AvaloniaEdit AbstractMargin with separate old/new columns, semantic gutter backgrounds, and bold current-line numbers.

src/app/GitUI/Editor/IFileViewer.cs.notes: SelectedLineEventArgs and the framework-neutral portion of IFileViewer are twinned. FileViewer implements text/selection access, Find, highlighting, line mapping/navigation, multi-file search loading, occurrence navigation, display options, and read-only state; WinForms-specific mouse/key/font/scrollbar event types stay at each UI framework boundary.

src/app/GitUI/Editor/GitBlameEntry.cs.notes: Age-bucket index and color; the Avatar image property waits for the avatar subphase.

src/app/GitUI/Editor/BlameAuthorMargin.c.notes: Extended role: an AvaloniaEdit margin that renders the age-bucket markers and the author line text itself, replacing the second scroll-synchronised author editor of the WinForms BlameControl. Avatars wait for the avatar subphase.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/BlameControl..notes: Commit info over the blamed file with the author margin; hover highlights the hovered commit's lines and shows the summary tooltip; caret movement drives the commit info; the context menu blames this/the previous revision (via IRevisionGridInfo/IRevisionGridFileUpdate), opens FormCommitDiff through Show changes, and copies hash/message/info; double-click blames the clicked line's revision. When no revision grid hosts the control, blame navigation opens FormCommitDiff like WinForms. Deferred: avatars, repository-hoster menu items (plugins), splitter persistence, and theme-adapted highlight/age colors.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/GitBlameParse.notes: Framework-free source linked unchanged into GitUI.Avalonia.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/IRevisionG.notes: Framework-free source linked unchanged into GitUI.Avalonia; implemented by the twin RevisionGridControl (DescribeRevision without ambiguous-ref disambiguation; parents-rewritten detection from the path filter).
Framework-free source linked unchanged; the Avalonia RevisionGridControl implements the selection member used by RevisionDiffControl.
Framework-free source linked unchanged into GitUI.Avalonia; implemented by the twin FormFileHistory.

src/app/GitUI/HelperDialogs/FormSelectMu.notes: Multi-select ListBox equivalent of the checked branch list; preserves SelectBranch and GetSelectedBranches.

src/app/GitUI/Resources/Help/HelpCommand.notes: Linked as an AvaloniaResource; the tracked PNG is shared unchanged.
Linked as an AvaloniaResource; the tracked PNG is shared unchanged.
Linked as an AvaloniaResource; the tracked PNG is shared unchanged.

src/app/GitUI/CommitInfo/CommitInfo.cs.notes: Simplified header + message; no links, avatars, or branch/tag expansion yet.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/CommitPickerS.notes: Text entry resolves a revision name or SHA; the picker button opens the shared FormChooseCommit twin. The commit-count hint remains deferred.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/PatchGrid.cs.notes: Interactive and apply-style rebase state parsing, translated HeaderText keys, applying/applied/skipped status, current-row selection, and virtualized multi-column display are functional. Header separators use the shared light/dark section-border brush. Row double-click opens normal commits in FormCommitDiff and mail/apply patches in FormViewPatch.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/CommitDiff.cs.notes: Same-named CommitInfo/FileStatusList/FileViewer composition, real-parent revision reload, selected-file following, continuous diff scrolling, Escape propagation, and descriptive title are functional.

src/app/GitUI/HelperDialogs/FormCommitDi.notes: Thin same-named host over CommitDiff with the original title propagation, size, minimum size, and centered-owner behavior.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormViewPa.notes: Portable storage-provider picker, lossless patch loading, shared PatchProcessor parsing, selectable filename/change/type rows, sortable headers, and fixed-patch FileViewer display preserve the original behavior and translation identities.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/CommitSummary.notes: Compact author/date/message/branches/tags summary; WinForms-specific color adaptation and resize code are unnecessary in the Avalonia layout.

src/app/GitUI/LeftPanel/RepoObjectsTree..notes: Flat Branches/Remotes/Tags lists with the original group/ref images, the native tree's compact 18px rows, and dotted hierarchy lines continuing through root nodes, expanders, and expanded descendants. Auto-hidden overlay scrollbars are disabled so simultaneous horizontal/vertical scrolling does not cover the last expanded item. No nested folders, stashes, or submodules yet.

src/app/ResourceManager/GitExtensionsFor.notes: Translation uses the one-pass Avalonia adapter while retaining shared XLF keys; window hotkeys use persisted shim Keys through KeysMapper and ExecuteCommand(int), with shared Escape-to-close for dialogs.

src/app/ResourceManager/GitExtensionsCon.notes: Retains the WinForms-shaped persisted hotkey table, shortcut display and text-edit-key classification; containing Avalonia forms route key events to controls explicitly.

src/app/ResourceManager/TranslatedContro.notes: Translation uses the one-pass Avalonia adapter while retaining shared XLF keys.

src/app/GitExtUtils/GitUI/DpiUtil.cs.notes: Identity twin: Avalonia layout units are DIP, scale is always 1.

src/app/GitUI/GitModuleForm.cs.notes: UICommands/Module plus the shared IGitUICommandsSource contract and hotkey service discovery; scripts remain deferred.

src/app/GitUI/GitModuleControl.cs.notes: Command-source discovery, Module/UICommands access and control-hotkey service discovery; disposal and script-command plumbing arrive with their consumers.

src/app/GitUI/IGitUICommandsSource.cs.notes: Framework-free source linked unchanged into GitUI.Avalonia.

src/app/GitUI/GitUICommandsSourceEventAr.notes: Framework-free source linked unchanged into GitUI.Avalonia.

src/app/GitUI/Hotkey/HotkeySettings.cs.notes: Framework-free source linked unchanged into GitUI.Avalonia.

src/app/GitUI/Hotkey/HotkeySettingsManag.notes: Reduced loader preserves the upstream XML format and command IDs for the implemented FormBrowse and FormResolveConflicts commands, plus the complete upstream RevisionGrid command/default table so persisted settings remain forward-compatible as handlers land. Settings editing, scripts, and other hotkey targets join as their consumers are ported.

src/app/GitUI/GitExtensionsDialog.cs.notes: MainPanel/ControlsPanel chrome is declared per-dialog in axaml, not inherited; shared visual-parity classes supply the standard 12px content margin, 32px action row, and 75x25 action-button minimums.

src/app/GitUI/GitUICommands.cs.notes: Process commands preserve upstream IGitCommand.AccessesRemote routing to FormRemoteProcess while local commands use FormProcess. Normal/amend/fixup/squash commit, push, pull/fetch, local/remote-checkout, create-branch, create-tag, delete-branch, delete-tag, reset-changes, stash (save/staged/pop/drop/apply with conflict follow-up), plain/interactive rebase, apply-patch, add-files, rename-branch, file-history, resolve-conflicts, submodule-update, and revision-range difftool members are real; unported members throw NotImplementedException.

src/app/GitUI/RevisionDiffInfoProvider.c.notes: Framework-free selected-revision to difftool-range mapping linked unchanged into GitUI.Avalonia.

src/app/GitUI/ServiceContainerRegistry.c.notes: Registers the plain-text command and embedded-shell emulation, shared Output history provider/recorder with trace forwarding, reduced hotkey settings loader, and cross-platform external-terminal launcher; Linux honors the desktop default through xdg-terminal-exec before named fallbacks.

src/app/GitUI/MessageBoxes.cs.notes: Reduced twin forwards generic overloads to the shared approved wrapper and ports the translated helpers in use: revision-not-found/filter messages, FailedToRunShell, Confirm, ConfirmResolveMergeConflicts, MiddleOfRebase, MiddleOfPatchApply, and ConfirmUpdateSubmodules (task dialog). Other domain-specific helpers join with their consumers.

src/app/GitUI/HelperDialogs/FormChooseCo.notes: Single-selection revision grid, preselection, current-branch/last-revision filters, direct SHA lookup, parent navigation, OK and double-click selection are functional. Artificial worktree/index revisions remain unavailable until the revision grid gains them.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormRename.notes: Verbatim port: auto-normalisation on focus loss (caret preserved), unchanged-name cancel, rename through the cross-platform FormProcess. The revision-grid context menu gains the upstream renameBranchToolStripMenuItem as a per-branch dropdown (underscores escaped for Avalonia access keys); the left-panel branch node entry waits for the left-panel context menus.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/RevisionGrid/.notes: Framework-free source linked unchanged into GitUI.Avalonia.

src/app/GitUI/CommandsDialogs/FormResetC.notes: Sizing follows the original: a custom message grows the dialog, clamped between its designed size and three quarters of the screen work area. The minimize box cannot be hidden separately in Avalonia.

src/app/GitUI/HelperDialogs/FormStatus.c.notes: Plain text console only; no taskbar progress or status badge icons.

src/app/GitUI/HelperDialogs/FormProcess..notes: Headless end-to-end success and failure tests pass; Escape now uses the shared dialog key handler instead of a form-specific override.

src/app/GitUI/HelperDialogs/FormRemotePr.notes: Same-named remote-command boundary reuses FormProcess progress, stdin authentication, cancellation, process-tree cleanup, and consumer HandleOnExitCallback/Retry behavior. OpenSSH is the portable path; PuTTY registry host-key caching, key-agent recovery, and their translation strings are intentionally absent.
The original subclass designer adds no controls and is not invoked by its constructor; the Avalonia twin correctly inherits the FormStatus visual tree without a duplicate axaml.

src/app/GitUI/UserControls/PasswordInput.notes: The reveal action switches between the original closed/open eye images. No drag and drop of text.

src/app/GitUI/ConsoleEmulation/PlainText.notes: Read-only TextBox output with flushed redirected input; Linux and macOS commands start through ProcessExtensions.StartInOwnProcessGroup so cancellation reaches re-parented group members; no clickable links yet. The Avalonia-only PlainTextConsoleShellRunner composes this runner with one command input and the platform shell.

Retains the plain-text command fallback and advertises one emulator only when the platform shell is usable. Its Avalonia-only emulator/shell-runner pair hosts COMSPEC on Windows and SHELL or /bin/sh on Unix without changing the WinForms registry.

src/app/GitCommands/Git/Extensions/Proce.notes: Shared source retains the Windows Ctrl+C path and adds portable entire-tree termination plus Linux setsid and macOS native-launcher process-group cleanup.

src/app/GitExtensions/Program.cs.notes: Entry point twin (with App.axaml.cs); browse command and repo detection only. Startup maps the platform default family and point-based AppSettings UI/commit/diff/monospace fonts into shared Avalonia resources, and maps the built-in Git Extensions light/dark setting to the matching Avalonia variant while Windows app color mode and future custom themes retain platform-default behavior.
